name: Vigilante Cloak
description: In the chaotic months following the uprising, the Magistrate struggled to contain the surge of crime that swept over Brynn. The tide turned with the rise of vigilantes - well-armed volunteers who eventually bolstered the ranks of the reformed city guard.
descriptionZh: 起义爆发之后，几个月里一片混乱，城联疲于应对席卷布林全城的犯罪浪潮。义勇出现之后，局势得以扭转——这些志愿者武装精良，最终加入了重组之后的城市卫队，壮大了卫队的力量。
